style_anchors: classical oil painting, masterpiece quality, warm golden lighting, renaissance art style, detailed brushwork, gallery-quality illustration, circular vignette composition, rich color palette, dramatic chiaroscuro, no text, no letters, no words, no watermarks
negative_prompt: text, letters, words, watermark, signature, photorealistic, 3d render, cartoon, anime, comic, digital art, modern, neon, flat colors, low quality, blurry, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy, distorted hands, extra fingers, mutated

1_iconic_scene.name: Iconic Scene
1_iconic_scene.description: The single most famous and recognizable scene or moment from the book

2_character_portrait.name: Character Portrait
2_character_portrait.description: The main character in a period-appropriate setting that reflects their story

3_symbolic.name: Symbolic / Allegorical
3_symbolic.description: An abstract or symbolic representation of the book's central themes

4_setting.name: Setting / Landscape
4_setting.description: The key location or environment from the story

5_dramatic_moment.name: Dramatic Moment
5_dramatic_moment.description: A pivotal, climactic, or emotionally charged scene
